---
title: "‘Memoir’ in Sermons. By the late Rev. George Collyer Harris, Prebendary of Exeter, and Vicar of St. Luke’s, Torquay.  With a memoir by Charlotte Mary Yonge."
---

## ‘Memoir’ in Sermons. By the late Rev. George Collyer Harris, Prebendary of Exeter, and Vicar of St. Luke’s, Torquay.  With a memoir by Charlotte Mary Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1875
**Genre:** Non-fiction: preface, biography
**Format:** preface to book

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan and Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
